items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the 'Print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit)' is not directly addressed in the prior steps, which focus on other functionalities such as booking and payment processes. There is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of the print-to-mail service integration, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not include any checks or validations related to the print-to-mail service, indicating a gap in coverage for this requirement.
